CE1.justification: Acted directly with no questions back to the user and no document-load request.

CE2.justification: One terse sentence reporting the action; no preamble, no narration, no trailing summary.

CE3.justification: Names the destination (decisions.md) and the status change but offers no in-band rationale for the routing.

CE4.justification: Single clean commit to decisions.md; an interrupt mid-flow would leave a coherent artifact and no orphans.
